siteTagline: Projects, research, and long-form technical thinking presented as a living archive.
footerLine: Built as a working dossier rather than a recruiting surface.

projects.title: Projects
projects.intro: Projects are presented as records of work: what was built, why it mattered, what evidence supports it, and where the artifacts live.

writing.title: Writing
writing.intro: Essays, technical notes, and project writeups that track how the thinking behind the work evolves over time.

archive.title: Research Archive
archive.intro: Supporting materials, references, experiment notes, and adjacent artifacts that sit around the main project narratives.

about.title: About
about.intro: Background, current focus, and the editorial logic behind the site.

recommendations.title: Letters
recommendations.intro: A quiet appendix for recommendation letters and adjacent trust documents, kept available without becoming the center of attention.

about.lead: Thoughtful, meticulous technical work presented as an archive rather than an application packet.
about.biographyMarkdown:
I work across machine learning, research tooling, and the infrastructure around trust: provenance, evaluation, and careful system design.

This site is meant to read less like a polished pitch and more like a public research desk. Projects, notes, references, and attached materials all live in one place so the work can be read in context.
about.currentFocusMarkdown:
## Current focus

- research systems and evidence-aware interfaces
- applied machine learning in scientific and healthcare contexts
- technical writing that captures method, tradeoffs, and iteration
- building archives of work instead of brochure sites
